summary: Verified 2 new UX features: Mini Ranking Block and Last 5 Pills (simplified). All backend APIs and frontend UI rendering verified working for both League and Tournament views.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: home.tsx lines 533-566 - Mini ranking block with data-testid='mini-rankings-block' shows top 3 with rank (°), username, pts and 'Vedi classifica' CTA
VERIFIED: home.tsx lines 679-701 - 'ULTIME 5 GIORNATE' shows simplified pills with matchday numbers below
VERIFIED: home.tsx lines 691-698 - Pills with points > 0 get orange highlight (last5PillActive style with #F7A21B)
VERIFIED: TournamentView.tsx lines 407-436 - Tournament mini ranking shows 'CLASSIFICA {GROUP_NAME}' with user's group standings
VERIFIED: TournamentView.tsx lines 488-507 - 'ULTIME SFIDE' shows pills only for completed matchups
VERIFIED: user.py line 259 - rankings_preview includes current_user_id field for highlighting current user
VERIFIED: Layout order correct - Hero > Mini Ranking > Performance > Last 5 Pills for both League and Tournament

Last 5 shows pills [0, 22, 0, 12, 0] for md 21-25. Tournament home shows Group C standings (TestPlayer20=6, admin=3, TestPlayer6=3) and ULTIME SFIDE with 1 completed round showing value 2.
